'''âw-y-y''' ('''kawayay''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|active verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:knip|knip]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| w-y-y
|-
! Word class
| [[Active verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:knip|knip]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âw-y-y
|-
! Lemma
| kawayay
|}

== [[Agent]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thiwayay|thiwayay]] || [[word:jiwayay|jiwayay]] || [[word:shiwayay|shiwayay]] || [[word:kiwayay|kiwayay]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthuwayay|thuthuwayay]] || [[word:jujuwayay|jujuwayay]] || [[word:shushuwayay|shushuwayay]] || [[word:kukuwayay|kukuwayay]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thuwayay|thuwayay]] || [[word:juwayay|juwayay]] || [[word:shuwayay|shuwayay]] || [[word:kuwayay|kuwayay]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thuwayay|thuwayay]] || [[word:juwayay|juwayay]] || [[word:shuwayay|shuwayay]] || [[word:kuwayay|kuwayay]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thewayay|thewayay]] || [[word:jewayay|jewayay]] || [[word:shewayay|shewayay]] || [[word:kewayay|kewayay]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothowayay|thothowayay]] || [[word:jojowayay|jojowayay]] || [[word:shoshowayay|shoshowayay]] || [[word:kokowayay|kokowayay]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thowayay|thowayay]] || [[word:jowayay|jowayay]] || [[word:showayay|showayay]] || [[word:kowayay|kowayay]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thowayay|thowayay]] || [[word:jowayay|jowayay]] || [[word:showayay|showayay]] || [[word:kowayay|kowayay]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thĂŠwayay|thĂŠwayay]] || [[word:jĂŠwayay|jĂŠwayay]] || [[word:shĂŠwayay|shĂŠwayay]] || [[word:kĂŠwayay|kĂŠwayay]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathawayay|thathawayay]] || [[word:jajawayay|jajawayay]] || [[word:shashawayay|shashawayay]] || [[word:kakawayay|kakawayay]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thawayay|thawayay]] || [[word:jawayay|jawayay]] || [[word:shawayay|shawayay]] || [[word:kawayay|kawayay]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thawayay|thawayay]] || [[word:jawayay|jawayay]] || [[word:shawayay|shawayay]] || [[word:kawayay|kawayay]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[active]].none || [[word:shawayay|shawayay]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:goshawayay|goshawayay]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokishawayay|gokishawayay]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]] || [[word:shawayaynĂŒ|shawayaynĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:goshawayaynknĂŒ|goshawayaynknĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokishawayaynĂŒ|gokishawayaynĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:shawayayshĂ«|shawayayshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshawayaynkshĂ«|goshawayaynkshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokishawayayshĂ«|gokishawayayshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:shawayayro|shawayayro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshawayaynkro|goshawayaynkro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishawayayro|gokishawayayro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]] || [[word:shawayaymu|shawayaymu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:goshawayaynkmu|goshawayaynkmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishawayaymu|gokishawayaymu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[mythical]] || [[word:shawayaysher|shawayaysher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:goshawayaynksher|goshawayaynksher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokishawayaysher|gokishawayaysher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[intention]] || [[word:shawayayng|shawayayng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:goshawayaynkng|goshawayaynkng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokishawayayng|gokishawayayng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[optative]] || [[word:shawayaya|shawayaya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:goshawayaynkya|goshawayaynkya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokishawayaya|gokishawayaya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:shawayayam|shawayayam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:goshawayaynkyam|goshawayaynkyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokishawayayam|gokishawayayam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:shawayaynĂŒshĂ«|shawayaynĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshawayaynknĂŒshĂ«|goshawayaynknĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishawayaynĂŒshĂ«|gokishawayaynĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shawayaynĂŒro|shawayaynĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshawayaynknĂŒro|goshawayaynknĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishawayaynĂŒro|gokishawayaynĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shawayaynĂŒmu|shawayaynĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshawayaynknĂŒmu|goshawayaynknĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishawayaynĂŒmu|gokishawayaynĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:shawayayshĂ«nĂŒ|shawayayshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshawayaynkshĂ«nĂŒ|goshawayaynkshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishawayayshĂ«nĂŒ|gokishawayayshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shawayayshĂ«ro|shawayayshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshawayaynkshĂ«ro|goshawayaynkshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishawayayshĂ«ro|gokishawayayshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shawayayshĂ«mu|shawayayshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshawayaynkshĂ«mu|goshawayaynkshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishawayayshĂ«mu|gokishawayayshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:shawayayronĂŒ|shawayayronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshawayaynkronĂŒ|goshawayaynkronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishawayayronĂŒ|gokishawayayronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:shawayayroshĂ«|shawayayroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshawayaynkroshĂ«|goshawayaynkroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishawayayroshĂ«|gokishawayayroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shawayayromu|shawayayromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshawayaynkromu|goshawayaynkromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishawayayromu|gokishawayayromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:shawayaymunĂŒ|shawayaymunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshawayaynkmunĂŒ|goshawayaynkmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishawayaymunĂŒ|gokishawayaymunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:shawayaymushĂ«|shawayaymushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshawayaynkmushĂ«|goshawayaynkmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishawayaymushĂ«|gokishawayaymushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shawayaymuro|shawayaymuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshawayaynkmuro|goshawayaynkmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishawayaymuro|gokishawayaymuro]]
|}

''63 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|dcef9d8}}
